[CONTRIBUTION EVENT]
- Type: AI Agent (software & documentation)

- Description: Branded open-tracking logo across Edgar + email drafts

  Details:
  **Estimated session time:** 15 minutes.
  
  Implemented branded open-tracking across Edgar + draft generators so tracking is visible during review and still logs opens/clicks.
  
  **What changed**
  - **sentiment_importer**: `/newsletter/open.gif` and `/email_agent/open.gif` now return the Agroverse logo asset (redirect) instead of 1x1 transparent bytes, while preserving sheet logging and click redirect flow.
  - **go_to_market (market_research)**: updated `email_agent_tracking.py` and `send_newsletter.py` to embed a visible Agroverse footer logo wired to the same open-tracking endpoints.
  - **tokenomics GAS**: updated `holistic_hit_list_store_history/email_agent_drafts.gs` (+ clasp mirror `EmailAgentDrafts.gs`) so Apps Script warm-up/follow-up drafts include HTML with branded tracking footer using `/email_agent/open.gif?tid=<suggestion_id>`.
  - Regenerated pending review drafts to carry new branded tracking and executed sending/reconciliation + follow-up sync.
  - Ran `clasp push` + `clasp deploy --deploymentId ...` for script `14gKJ0VW49RsSn4S03pgxKXy0sp4Z7Z3Wm1Wj8jQiWW5dj1sFuPnp95sh` (deployed version 14 on existing web app deployment).
